title: Visual Goat Horns
description: Adds visual variations to goat horns depending on their sound
body:
Ever thought of how goat horns could do a better job displaying what sound will they make? Well search no more, because Visual Goat Horns is here!

This pack adds 7 new textures for goat horns to represent the sounds sing, seek, feel, admire, call, yearn and dream, as shown in order in the image. The default texture is for the default sound, ponder.

![Goat Horns](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2022/319/16122348_l.webp)
